features: Panadol 500 mg Capsules. Contains paracetamol. For pain relief. Always read the label.
SUITABLE FOR 5 TYPES OF PAIN: Panadol Liquid Capsules provide temporary pain relief of cold & flu symptoms, and offer migraine relief, headache relief, back pain relief, and period pain relief
RAPID ABSORPTION, TARGETED PAIN RELIEF: These paracetamol capsules feature a distinctive liquid-filled soft gel design that allows for quick absorption, perfect to help you start feeling better again
THE ONLY UK LIQUID PARACETAMOL CAPSULE: Discover the only liquid paracetamol tablets in the UK market*, crafted by experts in pain relief
WITH PARACETAMOL: Panadol 500 mg Capsules contain paracetamol, which works differently to ibuprofen
description: Product Description Panadol Liquid Capsules are expertly formulated to provide you with effective and targeted pain relief. These liquid-filled paracetamol tablets are designed to offer migraine relief, headache relief, back pain relief, period pain relief, and they help combat toothache, muscular aches, and cold & flu symptoms. With a unique liquid-filled soft gel capsule design, Panadol Liquid Capsules absorb rapidly, delivering targeted pain relief when you need it most. These painkillers contain paracetamol which works differently to ibuprofen. Children aged 10-15 should take 1 capsule up to 4 times daily. Adults and children aged 16 years and over should take 1-2 paracetamol capsules up to 4 times daily. Do not exceed 4 capsules in 24 hours for children aged 10-15, and do not exceed 8 capsules in 24 hours for individuals aged 16 and over. Panadol Liquid Capsules do not contain gluten, lactose, or sugar, making them a great choice for those with dietary restrictions or sensitivities. These capsules provide convenience and efficacy, helping you fight everyday aches and pains, getting back to what matters most. Choose Panadol Liquid Capsules – the only liquid paracetamol in the UK market, from experts in pain relief. Ingredients 500 mg Paracetamol Macrogol 400 Purified water Propylene glycol Silica, colloidal anhydrous Capsule shell Gelatin Sorbitol, liquid, partially dehydrated Purified water Titanium dioxide (E171)
